---
title: "Keynotes"
title-block-style: none
description: "Browse interactive keynote presentations by chen.ist on cybersecurity, technology leadership, and digital transformation topics."
page-layout: custom
format:
  html:
    toc: false
listing:
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  type: grid
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  fields: [title, subtitle, date, description, categories, image]
  date-format: "MMMM D, YYYY"
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<div class="m-hero">
  <div class="container">
    <h1>Keynotes & <span class="gr">Presentations</span></h1>
    <p>Interactive talks on cybersecurity, technology leadership, and digital transformation — built with RevealJS and Quarto.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>What to expect</h2>
    <p class="sub">Every presentation is interactive, mobile-friendly, and available on demand.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-easel"></i><h3>Interactive Slides</h3><p>Keyboard and mouse navigation with speaker notes and presentation mode.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-phone"></i><h3>Any Device</h3><p>Responsive design that works on desktop, tablet, and mobile.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-filetype-pdf"></i><h3>PDF Export</h3><p>Print-friendly export for offline reference and sharing.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-code-slash"></i><h3>Live Code</h3><p>Executable code examples where applicable for hands-on learning.</p></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```

::: {.container}
:::

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<div class="m-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-d"></div>
    <h2>Need a speaker for<br>your next event?</h2>
    <p>Custom keynotes on cybersecurity, NIS2 compliance, and technology leadership — tailored to your audience.</p>
    <a href="https://cal.com/chenist" target="_blank" class="m-b">Book a call</a>
    <div class="m-sm">
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Custom topics &nbsp;
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Remote or on-site &nbsp;
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Interactive format
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
